trace.summary: Resolved acceptance gaps by wiring async jobs into reconciliation and bulk menu flows, adding nightly backup automation, completing JSAPI simulator integration, and expanding authorization/log-safety test coverage.
changes: Integrated queue-backed async processing for reconciliation imports and manager bulk menu updates, with worker handlers executing real business logic instead of status-only transitions.
Added automated maintenance tick behavior that runs bounded queued jobs and performs one nightly encrypted backup per UTC day after a configurable scheduler hour.
Implemented a full JSAPI simulator endpoint that creates signed callback packages and imports them through the same verification and dedup pipeline used by normal callbacks.
Expanded object-level authorization negative tests for cross-user resource access (orders and community block ownership) and added explicit log-safety assertions for sensitive detail redaction.
Updated API/design/runbook documentation to include async import/update endpoints, job processing endpoint, nightly automation behavior, and simulator flow coverage.

verification.command: cd repo/backend && python -m pytest unit_tests API_tests && python -m pytest ../frontend/API_tests ../frontend/unit_tests
verification.notes: Targeted modified-suite run: 35 passed. Full backend suite: 83 passed. Frontend regression suites: 11 passed.
